title: Tower T10083WHT Sonar Textured Kettle with Large Viewing Window & Blue Light, 360 Degree Base, 3000W, 1.7L, White
features: LARGE VIEWING WINDOW & BLUE LIGHT: A large viewing window is located by the handle and a blue light inside the kettle will allow you to see the water level, so you only use the water you need
360 DEGREE ROTATING BASE: A 360-degree swivel base makes the kettle easy to lift up and refill for both left and right-handed users
RAPID BOIL TECHNOLOGY: A quick boiling system takes the time out of drink-making, so you can boil the perfect morning brew in less that 45 seconds
AUTOMATIC LID-OPENING STRUCTURE: The lid will automatically open at the touch of a button, allowing for quick and easy refilling
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Drink-making is made quicker and easier with Tower Add style to your kitchen with the sleek Sonar Kettle from Tower. Its ribbed black body adds texture, while the clear window and blue light let you see the water level. Featuring rapid boil technology, it heats 1 cup in under a minute and has a large 1.7L capacity, perfect for families. The automatic lid ensures easy refills, and a removable filter helps tackle limescale. Its 360-degree base offers comfort for both left and right-handed users. Rapid boil technology to make hot drinks faster, boiling 1 cup in just 45 seconds Large 1.7L capacity can pour up to 7 cups from one fill, ideal for families and busy households 360-degree swivel base suitable for left & right-handed users Cord storage for a neat and tidy countertop

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Boil Dry Protection, Ergonomic Handle, Illuminated Water Window, Rotatable Base
